dashboard.label: Asset Discovery
dashboard.description: Discover Splunk indexes and sourcetypes that contain data matching your monitored endpoints

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | where _key="global" | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics")

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as unique_ips, values(hostname) as hostnames, values(target_ip) as ips, values(group) as groups, values(entitytype) as entity_types, values(device) as devices, values(vendor) as vendors by hostname | mvexpand hostnames | dedup hostnames | rename hostnames as asset_name, ips as ip_addresses | table asset_name, ip_addresses, groups, entity_types, devices, vendors | sort asset_name

html.p: Searches for indexes where your monitored IP addresses appear in common IP fields

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | dedup target_ip | head 50 | map maxsearches=50 search="| tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ (src_ip=$target_ip$ OR dest_ip=$target_ip$ OR ip=$target_ip$) BY index, sourcetype" | stats sum(count) as matched_events by index, sourcetype | where matched_events > 0 | sort -matched_events | head 20 | rename matched_events as "Events with Matching IPs"

html.p: Searches for indexes where your monitored hostnames appear in common host fields

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | dedup hostname | head 50 | map maxsearches=50 search="| tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ host=\"*$hostname$*\" BY index, sourcetype" | stats sum(count) as matched_events by index, sourcetype | where matched_events > 0 | sort -matched_events | head 20 | rename matched_events as "Events with Matching Hosts"

html.p: Enter an IP address or hostname to find all indexes/sourcetypes containing that asset

search.query: | tstats count WHERE index=$search_scope$ "$search_asset$" BY index, sourcetype | sort -count | rename count as "Matching Events"
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as asset_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as ip_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(group) as group_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(entitytype) as type_count
